functions.name: useState/useEffect in Server Component
functions.description: useState/useEffect can only be used in Client Components. Add 'use client' or refactor.

recommendation.title: Move client code to client component
recommendation.description: useState/useEffect can only be used in Client Components. Add 'use client' or refactor.

fix: Add 'use client' at top of component
Extract client logic to separate component
Pass data from server to client

functions.name: Unnecessary 'use client' directive
functions.description: 'use client' makes the component a Client Component. Use only if you need hooks or browser APIs.

recommendation.title: Remove unnecessary 'use client' directive
recommendation.description: 'use client' makes the component a Client Component. Use only if you need hooks or browser APIs.

fix: Remove 'use client' if hooks not needed

functions.name: Missing 'use server' for server actions
functions.description: Server actions should be marked with 'use server' directive.

recommendation.title: Add 'use server' for server actions
recommendation.description: Server actions should be marked with 'use server' directive.

catches: Actions run on client instead of server
fix: Place server actions in separate files

functions.name: fetch() without cache option
functions.description: fetch() without cache option may cause unnecessary fetches.

recommendation.title: Add cache option to fetch
recommendation.description: fetch() without cache option may cause unnecessary fetches.

functions.name: Dynamic data without cache config
functions.description: Dynamic data should have explicit cache configuration.

recommendation.title: Configure cache for dynamic data
recommendation.description: Dynamic data should have explicit cache configuration.

functions.name: State in shared layout
functions.description: State in shared layouts causes all pages to re-render. Move state to client components.

recommendation.title: Don't use state in shared layout
recommendation.description: State in shared layouts causes all pages to re-render. Move state to client components.

catches: All pages re-render when state changes
fix: Use context providers in client components

action.message: useState in layout file - consider moving to client component

functions.name: Dynamic metadata without generate
functions.description: Dynamic metadata should use generateMetadata function.

recommendation.title: Use generateMetadata for dynamic metadata
recommendation.description: Dynamic metadata should use generateMetadata function.

functions.name: next/image without optimization config
functions.description: next/image should have proper optimization configuration.

recommendation.title: Configure next/image optimization
recommendation.description: next/image should have proper optimization configuration.

functions.name: Google Fonts without optimization
functions.description: Use next/font/google for optimized font loading.

recommendation.title: Use next/font for Google Fonts
recommendation.description: Use next/font/google for optimized font loading.

fix: Remove link tags to Google Fonts

action.message: Google Fonts loaded without optimization - use next/font/google

functions.name: Missing dynamic imports for heavy components
functions.description: Heavy components should be lazy loaded with dynamic imports.

recommendation.title: Use dynamic imports for heavy components
recommendation.description: Heavy components should be lazy loaded with dynamic imports.

functions.name: Parallel route without default.tsx
functions.description: Parallel routes need a default.tsx to handle unmatched slots.

recommendation.title: Add default component for parallel routes
recommendation.description: Parallel routes need a default.tsx to handle unmatched slots.

catches: User sees nothing when slot inactive
fix: Handle both matched and unmatched states
